nasb.text: But when Herod died, behold, an angel of the Lord *appeared in a dream to Joseph in Egypt, and said,

esv.text: But when Herod died, behold, an angel of the Lord appeared in a dream to Joseph in Egypt,

cnv.text: 希律死後，在埃及，主的使者在夢中向約瑟顯現，

ccb.text: 希律死后，主的天使在梦中向在埃及的约瑟显现，说：

csbs.text: 希律死了以后，在埃及，忽然主的一位天使在约瑟梦中显现，
